subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-26 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: There are some people who make this short span of life miserable to themselves and others because they harbor envy in their hearts
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
